name: opensincera-cli
description: Command-line tool for querying OpenSincera publisher transparency data

scripts.install-claude-code: mkdir -p ~/.claude && cat skill/CLAUDE.md >> ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md && echo 'opensincera-cli appended to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md'

author: Yoshihiko Miyaichi <yoshihiko.miyaichi@pier1.co.jp>
